nodes.name: Overnight Oats — Berry Boost Variation
nodes.description: name: Overnight Oats — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Creamy overnight oats with apple and cinnamon—a protein- and fiber-rich breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Mix ingredients to make overnigh
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Overnight Oats — Berry Boost Variation - name: Overnight Oats — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Creamy overnight oats with apple and cinnamon—a protein- and fiber-rich breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Mix ingredients to make overnight oats: rolled oats, milk, plain yogurt, diced apple, and cinnamon. Refrigerate overnight and enjoy cold or warmed. | nutrition_note: A balanced, protein- and fiber-rich breakfast. Oats provide soluble fiber; yogurt adds protein and calcium; apple contributes vitamins and extra fiber. Cinnamon adds flavor with minimal calories and may help with blood sugar regulation.

nodes.name: Smoothie — Lemon-Herb Style
nodes.description: name: Smoothie — Lemon-Herb Style | short_description: Creamy banana-milk smoothie with peanut butter and oats; balanced protein, carbs, and fats with fiber. | meal_suggestion: Creamy, protein-forward
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Smoothie — Lemon-Herb Style - name: Smoothie — Lemon-Herb Style | short_description: Creamy banana-milk smoothie with peanut butter and oats; balanced protein, carbs, and fats with fiber. | meal_suggestion: Creamy, protein-forward smoothie great for breakfast or post-workout. For a lemon-herb twist, blend in lemon zest and a few fresh herbs (mint or basil) with the listed ingredients. | nutrition_note: Approx. 550–600 kcal per serving. Protein ~22–28 g; carbs ~60–70 g; fat ~22–28 g. Rich in potassium (banana), calcium/vitamin D (milk), and fiber (oats). Note: the lemon-herb flavor is not represented by the current ingredients; to add lemon/herb notes, blend in lemon zest and fresh herbs (e.g., mint or basil) — this will adjust macros slightly.

nodes.name: Granola & Milk — Garlic-Ginger Plate
nodes.description: name: Granola & Milk — Garlic-Ginger Plate | short_description: A quick bowl combining granola, milk, and banana for a simple breakfast or snack. | meal_suggestion: Keep as 1 serving granola + 1 cup m
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Granola & Milk — Garlic-Ginger Plate - name: Granola & Milk — Garlic-Ginger Plate | short_description: A quick bowl combining granola, milk, and banana for a simple breakfast or snack. | meal_suggestion: Keep as 1 serving granola + 1 cup milk + 1 medium banana. For more protein, use higher-protein milk or add yogurt; to reduce sugar, choose unsweetened granola. If you want a savory nod to the name, add a tiny pinch of minced garlic and grated ginger, but use sparingly as this will alter flavor and nutrition. | nutrition_note: Carbs from granola and banana; protein and calcium from milk. May be high in added sugars if granola is sweetened; consider unsweetened granola or smaller portions and add fiber with berries or seeds.
